name: Bacon Cheese Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Add the 3/4 cup of tap water to your Breadmaker, following the manufacturer's instructions for adding ingredients.
2. In a separate bowl, mix together 2 cups of bread flour, 1/2 cup grated sharp cheese, 1 tsp salt, 1 tbsp sugar, 1 tbsp butter, and 1 tsp dry yeast until well combined.
3. Pour the dry ingredient mixture into the Breadmaker.
4. Add 2 tablespoons of bacon bits to the Breadmaker.
5. Follow the remaining instructions on your Breadmaker's manual for completing the baking process.
6. Once finished, turn off the Breadmaker and allow the bread to cool before slicing and serving.
